zh.lifeSummary: 當WALTER DE CALTHORPE於1269年出生在英國諾福爾可希瑟時，他的父親WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE28歲，母親Celia Burnham29歲。他於大約1294年與Ela Stanhowe在英國諾福爾可威爾斯 可特 馮 澤亞結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1324年在英國享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当WALTER DE CALTHORPE于1269年出生在英国諾福爾可希瑟时，他的父亲WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE28岁，母亲Celia Burnham29岁。他于大约1294年与Ela Stanhowe在英国諾福爾可威爾斯 可特 馮 澤亞结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1324年在英国享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CALTHORPE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: WALTER
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When WALTER DE CALTHORPE was born in 1269, in Seething, Norfolk, England, his father, WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE, was 28 and his mother, Celia Burnham, was 29. He married Ela Stanhowe about 1294, in Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1324, in England, at the age of 55.

fr.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque WALTER DE CALTHORPE est né en 1269, à Seething, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Celia Burnham, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Ela Stanhowe environ 1294, à Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1324, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England
de.lifeSummary: Als WALTER DE CALTHORPE 1269 in Seething, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE 28 und seine Mutter Celia Burnham 29. Er hat um 1294 in Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England Ela Stanhowe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1324 im Alter von 55 Jahren in England.

Lui sposato Ela Stanhowe circa 1294, nel Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1324, nel England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: WALTER DE CALTHORPEが1269年にイギリスノーフォルクセエスイングで生まれた時，父WILLIAM DE CALTHORPEは28歳，母Celia Burnhamは29歳であった。約1294年にイギリスノーフォルクウエルズ ネクスト ス セアでEla Stanhoweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1324年にイギリスで55歳で死去した。

ko.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: 영국 노르폴크 웰스 니스트 테 시
ko.lifeSummary: WALTER DE CALTHORPE(이)가 1269년 영국 노르폴크 시스잉에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Celia Burnham(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1294년 영국 노르폴크 웰스 니스트 테 시에서 Ela Stanhowe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1324년 영국에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando WALTER DE CALTHORPE nasceu em 1269, em Seething, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Celia Burnham, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Ela Stanhowe aproximadamente 1294, em Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1324, em Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ro.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England

ru.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: веллс некст т сеа, норфолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда WALTER DE CALTHORPE родился в 1269 г. в местности ситинг, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Celia Burnham, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Ela Stanhowe около 1294 г. в местности веллс некст т сеа, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1324 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

Se casó con Ela Stanhowe aproximadamente 1294, en Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1324, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
